plan_adherence_notes: All 7 planned steps were completed exactly as specified. The test file contains all 5 planned test cases plus the makeRow factory. The only minor deviation is that step 4 uses getAllByRole('row').slice(1) to isolate data rows rather than querying via data-testid as the plan suggested — this is actually a better approach since the data-testid is on the table element, not individual rows. All tests pass.
missed_questions: Should tests verify the component handles a single row correctly (boundary case)?
Should tests verify that the table has proper accessibility attributes (role, scope on th elements)?
Are there any existing snapshot or visual regression testing patterns in the codebase that should be followed?
reason: The implementation fully satisfies the task requirements. All 5 tests pass, covering empty state, table headers, rank ordering, data rendering, and volume formatting (including M suffix). The research phase correctly identified TraderLeaderboard as a pure presentational component needing bare render(), followed the established AnalyticsSummaryCards.test.tsx patterns, and made sound decisions about end-to-end volume formatting tests vs mocking. The questions were focused and sufficient — the missed questions are nice-to-haves that would not materially change the test design.
